title: Multi-Ecosystem Competition in Artificial Intelligence Adoption and Diffusion
summary_en: The author provides a theoretical framework for understanding artificial intelligence (AI) diffusion dynamics in the presence of competing technologies with heterogeneous value propositions.
title_cn: 人工智能应用与推广领域的多生态竞争

title: How Much More Power Can the U.S. Grid Provide for AI? Projections and Policy Implications for 2030
summary_en: A team of RAND researchers estimated how much additional power capacity the United States is likely to have by 2030 by translating planned electricity supply resources into a common measure of reliable capacity. This brief summarizes the results.
title_cn: 兰德公司发布2030年美国电网支撑人工智能发展供电能力测算及相关政策意涵研究报告

title: Exploring Instability Risks in the U.S.-China AI Rivalry: Breakwater Game Overview and Initial Observations
summary_en: This paper presents an overview and observations on Breakwater, a game that explores instability risks in the U.S.-China rivalry and race to artificial general intelligence.
title_cn: 兰德公司发布美中人工智能竞争不稳定风险相关“防波堤博弈”研究概述及初步观察成果

title: Evaluating Large Language Models' Abilities to Process and Understand Technical Policy Reports
summary_en: The authors detail their development of a specialized benchmark for evaluating large language models' abilities to process and understand technical policy reports, thus addressing a gap in existing domain-specific evaluation.
title_cn: 兰德公司发布大语言模型处理与理解技术政策报告能力评估专项研究报告

title: The AGI Rideout Strategy for Reducing Strategic Risk and Promoting Stability in the Transition to Artificial General Intelligence
summary_en: The authors describe an artificial general intelligence (AGI) Rideout strategy to avoid geopolitical risks in the race toward and transition to AGI. The strategy prioritizes deterring conflicts and increasing U.S. tech infrastructure resilience.
title_cn: 兰德公司发布降低通用人工智能转型期战略风险、促进稳定的AGI稳守战略研究成果
